Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Or Stay Litigation
Off Calendar Sep-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS MELVILLE ISLAND, LLC and DENNIS FLYNN'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Or Stay Litigation is granted and the action is stayed. The fee request is denied without prejudice until resolution of the dispute. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg
